nodes.title: Authorize /v1 requests with Bearer token
nodes.description: HTTP middleware: for paths starting with /v1/ when api_key is set, require Authorization: Bearer matching settings. Success: call_next. Failure: 401 JSON missing or invalid token.

nodes.title: POST /v1/transcribe multipart
nodes.description: POST /v1/transcribe with multipart form: prompt (YAML/JSON string), files (images), optional provider, model, inline_yaml. Runs run_pipeline per file with temp image path. skip_gm rejected with 422. Success: JSON list of job results. Failure: 422 for invalid prompt, provider, or no files.
